custom_errors.name: OrderNotValid(string)
custom_errors.rationale: Catch-all reason-string revert for any handler that fails verification

custom_errors.name: PollTryNextBlock(string)
custom_errors.rationale: PollResult retry instruction: try again on the next block

custom_errors.name: PollTryAtBlock(uint256,string)
custom_errors.rationale: PollResult retry instruction: try again at the supplied block number

custom_errors.name: PollTryAtEpoch(uint256,string)
custom_errors.rationale: PollResult retry instruction: try again at the supplied unix epoch

custom_errors.name: PollNever(string)
custom_errors.rationale: PollResult terminal instruction: do not retry

custom_errors.name: ProofNotAuthed()
custom_errors.rationale: Merkle proof does not authenticate against the owner's registered root

custom_errors.name: SingleOrderNotAuthed()
custom_errors.rationale: Single-order hash is not authorized on the owner's registry

custom_errors.name: InvalidHandler()
custom_errors.rationale: Handler address is the zero address or does not implement IConditionalOrder

custom_errors.name: InvalidFallbackHandler()
custom_errors.rationale: Caller's fallback handler does not implement the muxer interface

custom_errors.name: InterfaceNotSupported()
custom_errors.rationale: Handler does not declare IConditionalOrderGenerator via ERC-165

custom_errors.name: InvalidHash()
custom_errors.rationale: Caller-supplied order hash does not match the regenerated tradeable-order hash

interface_ids.name: SIGNATURE_VERIFIER_MUXER_INTERFACE_ID
interface_ids.rationale: ERC-165 interface id for the Safe signature-verifier muxer dispatch
